items.title: Photographer Sues Artist Over Alleged Appropriation of More Than a Dozen of Her Images
items.summary: A photographer has sued popular artist Mickalene Thomas for allegedly appropriating more than a dozen of her images without consent or attribution. [Read More]

items.title: CineStill 50D Is a Perfect Slow Speed Film for Bright Summer Days
